name: Virtual Chromium NoVNC Sandbox
postCreateCommand: sudo apt-get update && sudo apt-get install -y wget && wget https://dl.google.com/linux/direct/google-chrome-stable_current_amd64.deb && sudo apt-get install -y ./google-chrome-stable_current_amd64.deb && rm google-chrome-stable_current_amd64.deb && echo 'Google Chrome successfully installed! Launching manually or automatically inside VNC display :1.'
